YAML File Name: PM_01 - Camera Permission Allow.yaml
Test Name: PM_01 - Camera Permission Allow
ATP Steps: 1. Camera permission popup appears → 2. Tap Allow → 3. Open camera from gallery
ATP Expected: Camera permission granted and camera opens successfully

YAML File Name: PM_02 - Camera Permission Deny.yaml
Test Name: PM_02 - Camera Permission Deny
ATP Steps: 1. Camera permission popup appears → 2. Tap Don't Allow
ATP Expected: Flow continues to next permission; Permission Required NOT shown on first deny

YAML File Name: PM_03 - Camera Permission Don't Ask Again.yaml
Test Name: PM_03 - Camera Permission Don't Ask Again
ATP Steps: 1. Camera popup → 2. Don't ask again + Don't allow → 3. Access camera
ATP Expected: Permission Required → OK → Android Settings when camera accessed

YAML File Name: PM_04 - Camera Permission Settings Recovery.yaml
Test Name: PM_04 - Camera Permission Settings Recovery
ATP Steps: 1. Deny camera → 2. Settings → 3. Grant camera → 4. Return

YAML File Name: PM_05 - Location Permission Precise Location.yaml
Test Name: PM_05 - Location Permission Precise Location

ATP Expected: Precise location granted; Nearby Devices dialog next

YAML File Name: PM_06 - Location Permission Approximate Location.yaml
Test Name: PM_06 - Location Permission Approximate Location

Test Name: PM_07 - Location Permission Deny

YAML File Name: PM_08 - Location Permission Don't Ask Again.yaml
Test Name: PM_08 - Location Permission Don't Ask Again
